title: echinochloa crus-galli f. exigua
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli f. exigua, also known as the Japanese barnyard grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli f. exigua include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
